product_highlights: TEGO® Sterol — bio-fermented phytosterol for skin care and conditioning
Specialty fermentation actives with superior purity and consistency
Sustainable bio-based alternatives to petrochemical cosmetic ingredients
Recombinant protein platform enabling scalable production of novel bioactives
Reduced environmental footprint vs traditional chemical synthesis routes
notes: Evonik's personal care division has made significant investments in biotechnology-derived ingredients as part of its broader sustainability strategy. Their biotech portfolio includes bio-fermented sterols, recombinant proteins, and sustainable alternatives to petrochemical-derived cosmetic ingredients. Evonik's industrial-scale fermentation capabilities enable the production of high-purity actives with consistent quality and a significantly reduced environmental footprint compared to traditional chemical synthesis. A trusted partner for formulators seeking scientifically validated, sustainably produced biotech ingredients from one of Europe's largest specialty chemicals companies.
